title: Avoid direct storage and return of mutable objects
description: Mutable objects should not be returned to a caller or accepted and stored directly. This rule checks that private arrays, collections and Dates are not stored or returned directly.
recommendation: Use an unmodifiable Collection or make a copy of the mutable object, and store or return the copy instead.
impact: Leaves you vulnerable to unexpected changes in your class state.

checks.message: Use an unmodifiable Collection or make a copy of the mutable object, and store or return the copy instead.
